overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city street in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring heavy futuristic traffic, massive digital billboards, and an elevated highway overpass. The camera moves steadily forward along a wet sidewalk, passing a concrete support pillar and a cherry blossom tree while the 'softsys' building looms in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with elevated highway and heavy traffic

events.description: futuristic sedan passes closely on the left, splashing water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, approaching a large concrete support pillar

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving past in the rain with headlights on

entered.detail: large dark building with illuminated 'softsys' signage on the facade
massive concrete and steel elevated highway structure spanning the road
thick concrete support pillar with yellow base and large digital billboard displaying advertisements
rain-slicked concrete sidewalk with puddles reflecting the city lights
scattered trash bags and litter accumulated on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk city street with the 'softsys' building visible on the left. The camera walks forward along a wet sidewalk toward a large concrete pillar supporting an elevated highway, while dense futuristic traffic streams past on the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk passing under elevated highway near landscaped tree

events.description: passing the large concrete pillar, entering the space under the elevated highway
slight camera turn to the right as passing the cherry blossom tree

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the concrete pillar and alongside a cherry blossom tree in a planter

notable_agents.action: yellow futuristic sports car speeding past on the wet road

entered.detail: distinctive tree with pink blossoms in a large wooden planter box on the sidewalk
long rectangular planter containing the cherry tree and other vegetation

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the massive concrete pillar and moves under the elevated highway, revealing a cherry blossom tree in a wooden planter on the right. The 'softsys' building remains visible on the left as futuristic vehicles continue to stream past on the rain-soaked road.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated transit line with digital billboards

events.description: moving deeper under the overpass, lighting becomes darker with more artificial illumination from billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overpass, moving away from the cherry tree and toward the distant city center

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper covered in vertical digital advertisements and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Now fully under the elevated highway, the camera moves past the cherry blossom tree and continues toward a distant cyberpunk tower covered in vertical billboards. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural and artificial sources, with the overpass structure dominating the upper frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban corridor approaching major intersection under elevated highway

events.description: large truck passes on the left, temporarily obscuring the view of oncoming traffic

agents.ego_description: continuing the walk under the overpass, approaching the distant intersection with increasing traffic density

notable_agents.action: large industrial truck with glowing accents passing slowly in the left lane

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues under the elevated highway toward a distant intersection, with the cyberpunk tower growing larger in the center of the frame. Heavy futuristic traffic continues to flow past on the wet road, and the environment remains consistently urban and overcast.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a rain-soaked cyberpunk street that transitions from an open cityscape into the sheltered shadow of a massive highway overpass. It begins on a wet sidewalk with the softsys building visible to the left, moving steadily toward a large concrete support pillar as futuristic traffic streams past on the adjacent road. As the camera passes the pillar and moves beneath the elevated highway, a cherry blossom tree in a wooden planter appears on the right while the overpass structure begins to dominate the upper frame. The scene then shifts toward a distant intersection, where the lighting blends natural overcast tones with artificial glows from a towering skyscraper covered in vertical billboards. Finally, the camera continues its advance under the concrete canopy, with the distant cyberpunk tower growing larger in the center of the frame amidst the constant flow of heavy traffic.
